name: HTS_SCHED_PROCESSES
description: Schedules processes submitted as asynchronous batch requests

columns.Name: SCHED_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key identifiying the process record

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of process to be executed (for instance Publish, or Reset to Last Published)

columns.Name: SCHEDULER_ID
columns.Comments: User ID of the scheduler submitting the job

columns.Name: SCHED_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Scheduler Pofile ID of the user submitting the job; null value corresponds to the default scheduler pofile (scheduling a manager's directs)

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date for the range of the schedule data being processed

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date for the range of the schedule data being processed

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the request submission time  of the batch job submitted to execute the process

columns.Name: EXEC_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the start time of execution of the main batch job that executes the process

columns.Name: EXEC_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the end time of execution of the main batch job that executed the process

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
